run_metadata.notes: open_findings.json empty; no preflight build.txt. UI scope: dashboard/ Next.js app (single route /).

agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Maps user routes, copy, navigation, loading/error/empty states, and basic a11y.

files_skipped: dashboard/app/api/** — server-only, out of UX agent scope

findings.title: Failed /api/projects shows empty portfolio with no error
findings.description: fetchProjects only sets projects when res.ok; on network or 5xx failure the user sees the same empty state as a truly empty account ('No projects yet'), with only a console.error. No retry or error message.

proof_hooks.summary: Non-OK response leaves projects unchanged; finally clears loading
Load app with API down → misleading empty onboarding

repro_steps: Block or fail GET /api/projects (e.g. stop API or return 500).
Open /. Portfolio shows empty state as if there are no projects.
findings.impact: Users may believe data is lost or that onboarding is required; support burden and wrong actions.

suggested_fix.approach: Track fetch error state; show inline error with retry; distinguish empty vs error.
tests_needed: E2E or integration: mock 500 on /api/projects, assert error UI

findings.title: No React error boundary around main app shell
findings.description: Root layout renders children with no error boundary. Any uncaught render error in portfolio/engine/project view white-screens the full app with Next.js default error UI and no Lyra-branded recovery.

proof_hooks.summary: Layout wraps only body + children, no ErrorBoundary

findings.impact: Single component bug can remove all navigation and context; poor recovery UX.

suggested_fix.approach: Add app/error.tsx and/or segment error boundary with reset and link back to portfolio.
tests_needed: Trigger throw in dev, confirm branded fallback

findings.title: Engine view shows 'no routing config' when APIs fail
findings.description: On fetch failure, routing defaults to {} and UI shows 'no routing config found' even when config may exist. Indistinguishable from a real empty config.

proof_hooks.summary: catch swallows error; empty routes branch

findings.impact: Misleading diagnosis for operators debugging connectivity vs config.

suggested_fix.approach: Separate error state; show 'Could not load routing' with retry.
tests_needed: Mock failed routing fetch, assert error copy

findings.title: Orchestration job dispatch errors are silent in the UI
findings.description: dispatchAction and enqueueWeekly throw on failure but callers do not catch; errors surface only in console. User sees loading ellipsis stop with no explanation.

proof_hooks.summary: throw new Error after !res.ok; onClick handlers have no try/catch UI

findings.impact: Operators cannot tell auth failure from network failure.

suggested_fix.approach: Catch errors; set toast or inline error state next to Run/enqueue buttons.
tests_needed: Mock 401 POST /api/orchestration/jobs, assert error message visible

findings.title: Inconsistent 'import' vs 'onboard' for the same flow
findings.description: Header button says 'import project'; modal title 'Onboard project'; CTA 'Onboard'; empty state says 'onboard project'. Same primary action uses three phrasings.
findings.impact: Minor cognitive load; hurts polish and search/help consistency.

suggested_fix.approach: Pick one term (e.g. 'Onboard') and use across button, modal title, and empty state.

findings.title: Linear sync uses native alert for errors
findings.description: Push/pull failures call alert(), unlike other surfaces that use inline text. Jarring and inconsistent with app tone.
findings.impact: Breaks flow on mobile/small windows; feels unpolished.

suggested_fix.approach: Replace with inline error banner matching ImportModal/FindingDetail patterns.

findings.title: Findings search field has no programmatic label
findings.description: Input uses placeholder 'search findings…' only. Labels should be associated via htmlFor/id or aria-label for screen readers.
findings.impact: Screen reader users may not understand the field purpose.

suggested_fix.approach: Add aria-label='Search findings' or visible label with htmlFor.

findings.title: Custom role=button cards handle Enter but not Space
findings.description: NextActionCard, FindingRow, ProjectCard use role=button and onKeyDown for Enter only. WCAG expects Space to activate actionable elements.
findings.impact: Keyboard users who use Space may think control is broken.

suggested_fix.approach: Handle Space (prevent scroll) or use native <button> layout.
tests_needed: Keyboard: Tab to card, Space activates

findings.title: Product voice undefined: Title Case nav vs lowercase CTAs
findings.description: Sidebar uses 'Portfolio', 'Engine', 'Agents' in title case; primary actions use lowercase ('import project', 'sync now'). No documented voice guide. Recommend: one sentence-level rule (e.g. 'UI chrome: Title Case; actions: sentence case' or all lowercase for tool aesthetic).

proof_hooks.summary: Compare Shell nav labels vs page primary buttons

findings.impact: Inconsistent future copy without a single source of truth.

suggested_fix.approach: Add docs/VOICE.md or CONTRIBUTING UX section; align Shell + page.tsx buttons in one pass.

next_actions.action: Add error/retry state when GET /api/projects fails
next_actions.rationale: Prevents false empty state and is highest user-facing failure mode.
Major enhancement per suite; isolates crashes from full app loss.
Operators otherwise cannot debug auth vs server errors.

next_actions.action: Document product voice; align import/onboard copy
next_actions.rationale: Unlocks consistent copy fixes including f-4bad4bea.

next_actions.action: Engine view: distinguish load error from empty routing
